user.title: Set up Fronius System
user.description: Enter the host, update interval, meter IDs, and Modbus IP restriction. Meter IDs are comma-separated. Minimum interval: 5 seconds. If this host has no stored token, the next step asks for the customer password.

user_password.title: Customer Password
user_password.description: Enter the customer password to create or refresh the stored token. The password is not stored in the config entry.

reconfigure.title: Review Fronius System
reconfigure.description: Review the host, update interval, meter IDs, and Modbus IP restriction. Meter IDs are comma-separated. Minimum interval: 5 seconds. If the stored token is missing or invalid, the next step asks for the customer password.

reconfigure_password.title: Customer Password
reconfigure_password.description: Enter the customer password to create or refresh the stored token.

error.invalid_meter_unit_ids: Enter meter IDs as comma-separated positive integers.
error.unsupported_hardware: Unsupported hardware. See logs for details.
error.invalid_api_credentials: Customer login failed. Check the password.
error.cannot_resolve_local_ip: Could not determine the Home Assistant IP for Modbus restriction.

init.title: Review Fronius System
init.description: The entry "{entry_title}" needs a valid customer token. Review the host, update interval, meter IDs, and Modbus IP restriction. Meter IDs are comma-separated. The next step asks for the customer password only if a new token is needed.

password.title: Customer Password
password.description: Enter the customer password to create or refresh the stored token.

error.invalid_meter_unit_ids: Enter meter IDs as comma-separated positive integers.
error.unsupported_hardware: Unsupported hardware. See logs for details.
error.invalid_api_credentials: Customer login failed. Check the password.
error.cannot_resolve_local_ip: Could not determine the Home Assistant IP for Modbus restriction.

abort.entry_not_found: The Fronius entry no longer exists.
